queue_item.action: Resolve divergent redundant monotonic-state replicas through a separately configured threshold authority without allowing either local replica to self-authorize.

progress.finding: Divergent replicas require separately administered threshold authorization over the exact candidate sequence and digest; highest-sequence selection alone is unsafe.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed: threshold selection; insufficient threshold; duplicate signer; expiry; non-candidate statement; conflicting threshold authorities.
progress.limits: Generated in-process keys do not demonstrate independent administration, hardware-backed custody, remote witness availability, or secure root-policy rotation.

queue_item.handoff: R-017 should define root-policy rotation and recovery: require old-threshold plus new-threshold authorization, monotonic root versions, expiry handling, and rejection of authority-set rollback.

canonical_queue_note: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json remains historically stale for frontier_research; continuity tooling should resolve effective owner state from additive queue-update records without overwriting other teams.
